name: @lojacobs/pi-roles
description_en: Role-based session configuration for pi coding agent. Launch a session as a named role and hot-swap roles mid-session, with optional pi-intercom and pi-mcp-adapter integration.
description_zh: pi 编码代理的基于角色的会话配置。以命名角色启动会话，并在会话中途热切换角色，可选集成 pi-intercom 和 pi-mcp-adapter。
